chunks.title: Jeremiah's Warning to the Jews in Egypt
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where Jeremiah recounts Judah's history of idolatry and pronounces God's judgment on those who fled to Egypt.

chunks.title: The People's Rejection of Jeremiah
chunks.reason: A dialogue exchange where the people reject Jeremiah's message and explain their reliance on the 'queen of heaven' for prosperity.

chunks.title: Final Oracle Against Judah in Egypt
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle where Jeremiah delivers God's final verdict on the people's stubbornness and predicts their destruction.
